subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 4
subcodes.first_line: O peoples of heaven and earth! Know ye that We made all things the treasuries of My power, then did We choose from them that which We made the adornment of My face
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اهل السموات و الارض فاعلموا بانا جعلنا کل الاشیا کنائز قدرتی ثم اختصصنا
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @symbolism, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
